meaning: adj.(疾病等)抗多种抗菌素(或毒物) 的
examples: Conclusion Fosfomycin may be a choice to treat clinical infect with multiresistant Escherichia coli.
If a bacterium carries several resistance genes, it is called multiresistant or, informally, a superbug.
Objective To evaluate the drug sensitive effect of fosfomycin on clinical multiresistant Escherichia coli in vitro.
